heading: Prerequisites
body:
- Atlas cluster with [BI Connector for Atlas](atlas/bi-connection)
  enabled

- [MySQL Workbench 6.3](https://www.mysql.com/products/workbench/)
  or later

  > **Note:** Versions of MySQL Workbench that are compatible with MySQL server
  > version 5.7 are also compatible with the BI Connector for Atlas.
  >
  > We recommend that you use a MySQL Workbench version between
  > and including versions 6.3 and 8.0.31 to guarantee compatibility.
